name: Spectris PLC
description: Precision instrumentation and controls company. Operates through Spectris Scientific (Malvern Panalytical, PMS) and Spectris Dynamics (HBK, VI-grade). 18.1% adjusted operating margin.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue £1,449m in FY2023 (+9.2%). Spectris Scientific and Dynamics divisions. Portfolio reshaped through disposals (Red Lion, Omega, Millbrook) and acquisition (VI-grade). Semiconductor, pharma and automotive end markets.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted operating margin 18.1% in FY2023 (up from 16.8%). Margin expansion through portfolio optimisation and operational improvements. Target 22%+ medium-term.
assumptions.risks: Cyclical industrial end-market exposure, semiconductor cycle, FX (>80% non-GBP revenue), M&A execution, competition from larger instrumentation peers (Danaher, Bruker).
assumptions.catalyst: Portfolio simplification, margin expansion toward 22%+, semiconductor capex recovery, EV/battery testing demand, share buybacks.
